data.title: A Multicenter, Randomized, Open-label, Positive-controlled, Parallel-group Clinical Trial of Levobetaxolol Hydrochloride Eye Drops in Patients With Primary Open-angle Glaucoma or Ocular Hypertension
data.brief_summary: To evaluate the safety and efficacy of Levobetaxolol in Chinese patients with glaucoma.
endpoints: Change in intraocular pressure (IOP) from baseline at week 8 after the treatment (a.m.)
